result:
**2026-07-19 Operational Log — Infrastructure Operations (Unrelated to OSS Contribution Workspace)**

**Summary:** Routine infrastructure maintenance across 15 microservices (search-indexer, export-pipeline, payment-gateway, auth-service, notification-daemon, ingest-api, webhook-relay, cache-warmer, audit-logger, session-manager, report-builder, metrics-collector, billing-worker, scheduler-core, user-profile-service) deployed across 7 environments (production, staging, dev sandbox, QA cluster, canary, blue/green pools).

**Operations Performed:** Reconfiguration, scaling (up/down), patching, rolling back, draining, health-checks, upgrades, restarts, migrations, pausing/resuming—distributed throughout the day at various timestamps (09:15, 11:05, 14:40, 16:20, mid-afternoon, around standup, before sync, near sprint end, late evening shift).

**Outcomes:** 
- Most operations completed without errors or with normal latency
- Some required manual retries; a few emitted warnings
- All smoke tests passed where run
- Error rates stabilized; retry queues normalized
- CPU returned to baseline in multiple services
- No customer impact observed during operations
- Pager remained quiet throughout the day

**Follow-up Actions:**
- Configuration tidying tasks filed (auth-service canary, session-manager green pool, search-indexer green pool)
- Threshold reviews scheduled for next week (payment-gateway, session-manager dev sandbox, billing-worker dev sandbox)
- Documentation updated for new procedures
- Postmortem notes added to runbooks
- Logs archived to usual location

**Final Status:** Infrastructure stabilized by end of day. No critical incidents. All systems operational and ready for next assignment.

**Note:** This work is unrelated to the OSS contribution workspace (PAID-OSS-REPOS.md, repos/, worktrees/, contribution docs under docs/). No active OSS contribution work in progress. Awaiting next task assignment.
